raw_question: 计算2025年第三季度66家公司的净利润中位数，找出净利润高于中位数且销售毛利率低于行业均值的公司，列出股票代码、简称、净利润、销售毛利率。
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"计算2025年第三季度66家公司的净利润中位数，找出净利润高于中位数且销售毛利率低于行业均值的公司，列出股票代码、简称、净利润、销售毛利率。"}]

query_plan.question: 计算2025年第三季度66家公司的净利润中位数，找出净利润高于中位数且销售毛利率低于行业均值的公司，列出股票代码、简称、净利润、销售毛利率。

sql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, net_profit, gross_profit_margin, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY net_profit) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'), median_rows AS ( SELECT AVG(net_profit) AS median_net_profit FROM ranked WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2)), industry_avg AS ( SELECT AVG(gross_profit_margin) AS avg_gross_margin FROM ranked) SELECT r.stock_code, r.stock_abbr, r.net_profit, r.gross_profit_margin FROM ranked r CROSS JOIN median_rows m CROSS JOIN industry_avg a WHERE r.net_profit > m.median_net_profit AND r.gross_profit_margin < a.avg_gross_margin ORDER BY r.net_profit DESC
sql_history: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, net_profit, gross_profit_margin, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY net_profit) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'), median_rows AS ( SELECT AVG(net_profit) AS median_net_profit FROM ranked WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2)), industry_avg AS ( SELECT AVG(gross_profit_margin) AS avg_gross_margin FROM ranked) SELECT r.stock_code, r.stock_abbr, r.net_profit, r.gross_profit_margin FROM ranked r CROSS JOIN median_rows m CROSS JOIN industry_avg a WHERE r.net_profit > m.median_net_profit AND r.gross_profit_margin < a.avg_gross_margin ORDER BY r.net_profit DESC

meta.source_sql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, net_profit, gross_profit_margin, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY net_profit) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt FROM financials_view WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'), median_rows AS ( SELECT AVG(net_profit) AS median_net_profit FROM ranked WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2)), industry_avg AS ( SELECT AVG(gross_profit_margin) AS avg_gross_margin FROM ranked) SELECT r.stock_code, r.stock_abbr, r.net_profit, r.gross_profit_margin FROM ranked r CROSS JOIN median_rows m CROSS JOIN industry_avg a WHERE r.net_profit > m.median_net_profit AND r.gross_profit_margin < a.avg_gross_margin ORDER BY r.net_profit DESC

1.  云南白药 (000538)：净利润 477,711.97 万元，销售毛利率 30.06%

8.  亚宝药业 (600351)：净利润 21,509.43 万元，销售毛利率 52.13%

10. 精华制药 (002349)：净利润 17,637.27 万元，销售毛利率 52.66%
